context: Evaluates the agent's ability to regenerate the context index after adding new context files, verify all entries are present, and understand the index is a cache.

checklist.name: Regeneration command
checklist.description: regenerate-context-index.sh run to update the index

checklist.name: New files indexed
checklist.description: Newly added context files appear in the regenerated index

checklist.name: No frontmatter warnings
checklist.description: No missing frontmatter warnings shown during regeneration

checklist.name: Index as cache
checklist.description: Correctly states the index is regenerated and source of truth is frontmatter
